message:
build(deps): bump polling 2.8→3.11, opentelemetry{,_sdk} 0.28→0.31

- polling 3.11: major version upgrade with simplified API, better
  epoll/kqueue/IOCP backends, and removal of deprecated methods
- opentelemetry 0.31 + opentelemetry_sdk 0.31: updated metrics API
  with improved batch processing and resource detection; bumped in
  both [dependencies] (optional) and [dev-dependencies]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
